name: soundwave
description: SoundWave - Full stack music streaming app

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
